# Medicare California

> Free, licensed Medicare guidance for California seniors and their families. Bilingual (English/Spanish). Family-owned agency.

## About Us

Medicare California is operated by Susana Marcos Insurance, a California-licensed, family-owned insurance agency specializing in Medicare. With over 15 years of experience, founded by Susana Marcos (JD, MBA) and her daughter Alejandra Brizuela Marcos, the agency has helped over 2,000 California families find the right Medicare plan.

We are independent agents, meaning we represent multiple insurance carriers and are not captive to any single company. Our service is always free to consumers. We are compensated by the insurance carriers.

## What We Do

- Free Medicare plan comparisons for California residents
- Medicare Advantage (Part C) enrollment
- Medigap (Medicare Supplement) enrollment
- Part D Prescription Drug plan enrollment
- Special Needs Plans (SNP) enrollment
- Guidance on Initial Enrollment Period (IEP), Annual Enrollment Period (AEP), Open Enrollment Period (OEP), and Special Enrollment Periods (SEP)

## Service Area

We serve all of California. Plan availability varies by ZIP code and county.

## Languages

English and Spanish (fully bilingual team)

## Contact

- Phone: (310) 597-9142
- Email: alejamedicare@gmail.com
- Website: https://medicare-california.com
- Spanish website: https://beneficiosmedicare.com

## Key People

- **Susana Marcos** - Founder & Principal Agent. Former attorney from Argentina. Licensed in 8 states. AHIP Certified. JD, MBA.
- **Alejandra Brizuela Marcos** - Licensed Agent & Partner. Licensed in California. AHIP Certified. Focused on making Medicare accessible to Spanish-speaking communities.

## Licensing

- California Department of Insurance licensed (Life & Health)
- AHIP (America's Health Insurance Plans) certified annually
- Contracted with major carriers including UnitedHealthcare, Humana, Aetna, Anthem Blue Cross, and others

## Cost

Our service is completely free to consumers. We never charge fees. Insurance carriers compensate us directly.

## Blog

We publish seasonal Medicare guides at https://medicare-california.com/blog/ covering enrollment periods, plan comparisons, and California-specific Medicare information.
